ClassroomState.title: Classroom State
ClassroomState.description: Represents the real-time operational state of the smart classroom

occupancy.description: Current number of people in the room

mode.description: Current operating mode of the classroom

lightOn.description: Whether the lights are turned on

fanOn.description: Whether the ventilation fan is turned on

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last state update

SystemLog.title: System Log
SystemLog.description: Represents an event or standard log from the classroom operations

/classrooms/{classroomId}.description: Stores the master state for a classroom

/classrooms/{classroomId}/logs/{logId}.description: Stores the history of action logs for a classroom
